strings.source: Texture, tone and comfort considered together.
strings.pt_BR: Texture, tone and comfort considered together.

strings.source: A measured approach to laser hair removal and skin quality.
strings.pt_BR: A measured approach to laser hair removal and skin quality.

strings.source: A clean Sofiati signature for professional evaluation, laser precision and natural-looking skin care.
strings.pt_BR: A clean Sofiati signature for professional evaluation, laser precision and natural-looking skin care.

strings.source: A consultation-first experience for visitors who want clear next steps before choosing a protocol.
strings.pt_BR: A consultation-first experience for visitors who want clear next steps before choosing a protocol.

strings.source: A distilled appointment suite that removes noise and keeps evaluation central.
strings.pt_BR: A distilled appointment suite that removes noise and keeps evaluation central.

strings.source: A high-luxury editorial direction with fewer, stronger moments and a strong portrait presence.
strings.pt_BR: A high-luxury editorial direction with fewer, stronger moments and a strong portrait presence.

strings.source: A laser-led interface where technology is explained through suitability, safety and aftercare.
strings.pt_BR: A laser-led interface where technology is explained through suitability, safety and aftercare.

strings.source: A luminous skin-quality direction for texture, clarity, comfort and responsible glow.
strings.pt_BR: A luminous skin-quality direction for texture, clarity, comfort and responsible glow.

strings.source: A measured grid that keeps evaluation, services and results in calm balance.
strings.pt_BR: A measured grid that keeps evaluation, services and results in calm balance.

strings.source: An airy light-led homepage with radiant imagery and concise care pathways.
strings.pt_BR: An airy light-led homepage with radiant imagery and concise care pathways.

strings.source: An ultra-minimal clinical edit where fine lines, restraint and clarity carry the brand.
strings.pt_BR: An ultra-minimal clinical edit where fine lines, restraint and clarity carry the brand.

strings.source: A clinical-tech atlas for visitors comparing laser, skin quality and suitability.
strings.pt_BR: A clinical-tech atlas for visitors comparing laser, skin quality and suitability.

strings.source: A composed editorial authority concept with disciplined spacing and clinical warmth.
strings.pt_BR: A composed editorial authority concept with disciplined spacing and clinical warmth.

strings.source: A dynamic journey that turns care planning into a clearer sequence of steps.
strings.pt_BR: A dynamic journey that turns care planning into a clearer sequence of steps.

strings.source: A graceful portrait-led direction that makes Franciele central from the first viewport.
strings.pt_BR: A graceful portrait-led direction that makes Franciele central from the first viewport.

strings.source: A radial Sofiati concept shaped around halo frames, circular cues and profile authority.
strings.pt_BR: A radial Sofiati concept shaped around halo frames, circular cues and profile authority.

strings.source: A shape-led composition using contours, layered cards and dimensional service cues.
strings.pt_BR: A shape-led composition using contours, layered cards and dimensional service cues.

strings.source: A softer care journey built around renewal, botanical calm and responsible transformation.
strings.pt_BR: A softer care journey built around renewal, botanical calm and responsible transformation.

strings.pt_BR: A translucent light concept with ivory panels, luminous image reveals and soft focus.

strings.source: A verdant botanical architecture with stronger green structure and organic navigation.

strings.pt_BR: An atmospheric Sofiati flow with soft overlays, sensory pacing and calm contrast.

strings.pt_BR: An immersive botanical direction where leaf detail, portrait and form become the structure.
